JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAY-08-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL, CONT'D FROM 5-7-97; NO COURTROOMS AVAILABLE.
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: JURY TRIAL ASSIGNED TO SUPERIOR COURT JUDGE CARLOS BEA, DEPARTMENT 16.

SUP CT DEPT 16/JUDGE CARLOS BEA/CLERK:RANI EDWARDS. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ATNY SIDNEY BERENSTEIN PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFTS ROSE D'EUFEMIA AND ANTHONY D'EUFEMIA PRESENT IN PRO-PER. ROLL CALL OF PROSPECTIVE JURORS; SWORN AS TO QUALIFICATIONS. VOIR DIRE BY COURT; PEREMPTORY CHALLENGES EXERCISED BY BOTH SIDES. 12 JURORS PLUS 1 ALT JUROR SWORN. OPENING ARGUMENTS BY BOTH SIDES. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED; BOTH SIDES REST. COURT PRE-INSTRUCTS JURY. CLOSING ARGUMENTS BY BOTH SIDES. BAILIFF SWORN; JURY RETIRES TO DELIBERATE.

SUP CT DEPT 16/JUDGE CARLOS BEA/CLERK:RANI EDWARDS. 4:55PM: JURY RETURNS WITH VERDICT. VERDICT READ BY CLERK IN OPEN COURT: JURY FINDS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST BOTH DEFENDANTS FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AND FOR BACK RENT OF $440 PLUS DAMAGES OF $899.85 FOR TOTAL BACK RENT & DAMAGES OF $1339.85. JURY IS THANKED AND EXCUSED BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT D'EUFEMIA, ROSE D'EUFEMIA, ANTHONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 642 JONES STREET #503, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,339.85 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,339.85, LEASE FORFEITED
